---
title: 'I just don''t know if  #Sonic fast food is a sustai...'
date: '2015-06-19T01:21:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '5485629908710848665'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
---

I just don&#39;t know if  #Sonic fast food is a sustainable business model going into the next two decades.
